ic interface Typeable extends HasTypeConstraints Interface for objects with types. This interface defines methods for setting and getting types and type constraints. Type constraints are represented as inequalities between Typeable objects. Since:

as inequalities between Typeable objects. Since: Ptolemy II 0.4 Version: $Id$ Author: Yuhong Xiong, Xiaojun Liu, Edward A. Lee See Also: InequalityTerm Pt.AcceptedRating: Red (cxh) Pt.ProposedRating: Red (yuhong) Method Summary All Methods Instance
